overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character exploring a gothic castle interior with ornate stone architecture, stained glass windows, and warm artificial lighting. The character walks through corridors, a grand hall with a fireplace, up staircases, and interacts with the environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic corridor with stained glass ceiling

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a dimly lit stone corridor with green stained glass ceiling panels

entered.detail: green-tinted stained glass panels set into the arched stone ceiling
gothic stone arch at the end of the corridor
ornate wall-mounted lanterns casting warm orange light
decorative iron railings lining both sides of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, dimly lit gothic corridor with green stained glass ceiling panels and ornate metal railings. Warm light from wall sconces illuminates the patterned marble floor as the character approaches a stone archway at the end of the hall.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand common room with fireplace and seating

events.description: exits narrow corridor into a large open hall with a lit fireplace and seating areas

agents.ego_description: entering a grand hall and walking past seating areas toward a large staircase

notable_agents.action: person sitting in armchair near the fireplace reading
person in dark robes descending the grand staircase

entered.detail: large stone fireplace with burning fire and ornate mantelpiece
upholstered seating furniture arranged around the room
wide marble staircase leading to the upper level
framed portraits hanging on the stone walls

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the corridor into a spacious grand hall dominated by a large fireplace and comfortable seating. NPCs are scattered throughout—one reading by the fire and another descending the stairs—as the character walks toward the grand staircase.

events.description: begins ascending the wide marble staircase
passes by a descending NPC who temporarily blocks the view

agents.ego_description: climbing the wide marble staircase toward the upper level with domed ceiling

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes descending the stairs toward the camera

entered.detail: ornate domed ceiling with blue stained glass center window
stone balustrades lining the upper landing

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the grand marble staircase toward an ornate domed ceiling with blue stained glass. A descending student passes by, temporarily blocking the view, as the stone pillars and balcony railings of the upper level come into view.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper common room with tall windows and seating

events.description: reaches the top of the staircase and turns left to explore the upper hall
moves from the main hall into a side passage with stone columns

agents.ego_description: walking through the upper hall, passing seating areas and tall windows, heading toward a side passage

notable_agents.action: person sitting in armchair near a lit table lamp

entered.detail: tall arched windows showing dark night sky outside
large cylindrical stone pillars supporting the ceiling
large potted plants placed between columns
narrower spiral staircase entrance with tapestries

segments.scene_description: Upon reaching the upper landing, the character turns left and explores the upper hall with tall gothic windows revealing night outside. The space features stone columns, potted ferns, and additional seating areas before transitioning toward a side passage with a spiral staircase.

events.description: begins ascending the narrow spiral staircase with tapestries

agents.ego_description: climbing the winding stone staircase with tapestries hanging on the walls

entered.detail: narrow winding stone staircase with worn steps
large woven tapestries depicting scenes hanging on the stone walls
arched stone doorway at the top of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The character enters and ascends a narrow spiral staircase lined with large woven tapestries and illuminated by wall sconces. The enclosed stone passage winds upward toward an arched doorway at the top.

scene_state.functional_zone: small circular antechamber with ornate door

events.description: reaches the top of the stairs and enters a small circular room
approaches and stops before a large ornate wooden door

agents.ego_description: entering a small circular room and approaching a large carved wooden door

entered.detail: tall dark wooden door with intricate carvings and metal studs
wooden chest with metal bands sitting on the floor
stone archway framing the entrance to the small room

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the spiral staircase into a small circular antechamber containing a treasure chest and potted plants. The character approaches a large ornate wooden door with intricate carvings at the far end of the room.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a narrow, dimly lit gothic corridor into the expansive heights of a castle's upper chambers. It begins by moving through a corridor with green stained glass and marble floors, passing under warm wall sconces before emerging through a stone archway into a spacious grand hall centered around a large fireplace. As the camera follows the character toward the grand marble staircase, the view shifts upward toward a blue stained glass dome and stone pillars, briefly obscured by a passing student. The scene then expands across an upper landing featuring tall gothic windows that reveal the night sky and potted ferns, before turning into a narrow spiral staircase lined with woven tapestries. Finally, the camera winds upward through the enclosed stone passage and emerges into a small circular antechamber, coming to a stop before a large, intricately carved wooden door.
